name: GlassesReader
summary: Phone app streams visible reading text to Rokid glasses via Bluetooth in real time
description: GlassesReader captures visible text from Android apps using accessibility services and streams it live to Rokid AR glasses. It supports Chinese reading apps like WeChat Reading and works with other readers exposing text to accessibility. The UI is in Chinese and requires Bluetooth connection to Rokid glasses.
author: conclean

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
About GlassesReader

GlassesReader is an Android companion app that captures visible text from the phone screen using accessibility services and streams it in real time to Rokid smart glasses via Bluetooth. It is designed primarily for Chinese reading apps such as WeChat Reading but also supports other reading scenarios where text is accessible.

Key features

- Intelligent text capture from foreground apps using accessibility service
- Real-time text streaming to Rokid glasses with custom display pages
- Automatic reconnection to previously paired Rokid devices
- Dual control interfaces: main floating action button and draggable floating toggle
- Adjustable display settings including brightness, font size, and text processing options

How it works

- Requires enabling accessibility service, overlay permissions, and Bluetooth permissions
- Connects to Rokid glasses via Bluetooth SDK
- Captures screen text changes and pushes updates to glasses

Controls

- Main floating action button to start/pause text streaming service
- Floating toggle button to show/hide overlay and control service

Requirements

- Android 10 or higher
- Bluetooth-enabled Android phone
- Rokid smart glasses in pairing mode (disconnect official app first)

Notes

- Only one app can connect to Rokid glasses at a time; disconnect official app before connecting
- Text capture depends on accessibility node availability; some apps using custom rendering may not be fully supported
- UI is Chinese only

For more details and APK downloads, visit the [project homepage](https://glassesreader.conclean.top/) or the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/conclean/GlassesReader).
